DESC.TITLE: About me
DESC.NAME: José Alejandro Arias
DESC.DESCRIPCION_1: Experienced software developer, with expertise in analysis and development of information systems. Proficient in Java and experienced in developing information systems using technologies like Spring Boot.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_2: Strong skills in software development, application integration, and process automation using various programming languages, including Java, TypeScript, CSS, and HTML.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_3: Expert in using agile methodologies like Scrum and Kanban, and experienced in continuous integration. Proficient in using software tools like Confluence for documentation. Advocate for open-source software.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_4: Focused on staying up-to-date with the latest technological advancements, I am analytical, creative, quick learner, and have a mentor mindset. Passionate about technology and application development, always striving to deliver the best results.
